nonclaims: No proof of Jet-Laplacian rank stability is claimed.
No proof of spectral stability is claimed.
No proof of a global rank theorem is claimed.
No proof of gravity, Einstein-limit, metric-backreaction, or continuum limit is claimed.
No Navier-Stokes singularity or self-similar blow-up result is claimed.
The singular-value and rank-margin fields are finite numerical certificate boundaries only.
